title: The Lord of the Rings Online™

notes: As others have said Game runs perfectly well but in game store is unavailble
title: The Lord of the Rings Online™

notes:
You can get DirectX11 working by following this guide on Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/SteamPlay/comments/9umhk2/getting_directx11_working_in_lord_of_the_rings/
There are some issues though, for example the quest ring above NPC heads goes behind bushes/rocks. Same with the Stable NPCs.
title: The Lord of the Rings Online™

notes:
Was able to get everything working eventually: DX11, Store (external only). Seemed as stable as running on Windows, only crashed experienced were same as on WIndows (eg occassional CTD when swift travelling). To get DX11 working, follow the instructions here
To get the store to load, open the Launcher menu and select Options, go to the General Tab and set it to use the Legacy Client (bottom option). This will load the store in an external browser. If you use something a javascript blocker, like the NoScript extension in Firefox as I do, you will need to whitelist lotro.com, xsolla.com and xsolla.net or you will get a 404 error.
title: The Lord of the Rings Online™
